title: Speaking - Part 3
description: Discuss the options shown with your partner for about two minutes, then decide together which two would be most effective.

content.task: Discuss the following developments that have changed the way people communicate, then decide which two have had the most significant impact on society.

script.text: Now, I'd like you to talk about something together for about two minutes. Here are some developments that have changed the way people communicate.
Now decide which two developments have had the most significant impact on the way people communicate.
